languages.original_text: "The concentration of sickly rust in your aura... is guilt, Genetor. And the bitterness of that guilt gnaws at my eyes, dredging up tears unbidden."

languages.text: "Средоточие болезненного ржавого в вашей ауре... это вина, генетор. И горечь этой вины разъедает мои глаза, против воли навлекая на них слезы".
"The concentration of sickly rust in your aura... is guilt, Genetor. And the bitterness of that guilt gnaws at my eyes, dredging up tears unbidden."
languages.original_text: "Средоточие болезненного ржавого в вашей ауре... это вина, генетор. И горечь этой вины разъедает мои глаза, против воли навлекая на них слезы".

"The concentration of sickly rust in your aura... is guilt, Genetor. And the bitterness of that guilt gnaws at my eyes, dredging up tears unbidden."
"The concentration of sickly rust in your aura... is guilt, Genetor. And the bitterness of that guilt gnaws at my eyes, dredging up tears unbidden."

languages.text: «Esa concentración de óxido enfermizo en su aura... es culpabilidad, genetor. Y la amargura de esa culpabilidad me atenaza los ojos, convocando lágrimas espontáneas».
languages.original_text: "The concentration of sickly rust in your aura... is guilt, Genetor. And the bitterness of that guilt gnaws at my eyes, dredging up tears unbidden."

traits.locale_text: «Esa concentración de óxido enfermizo en su aura... es culpabilidad, genetor. Y la amargura de esa culpabilidad me atenaza los ojos, convocando lágrimas espontáneas».

languages.text: 「あんたのオーラに渦巻く、病んだ錆の濃さ……それは罪悪感だよ、ゲネター。そしてその罪悪感の苦さが、あたしの目を蝕んで、望みもしない涙を引きずり出すのさ」
languages.original_text: "The concentration of sickly rust in your aura... is guilt, Genetor. And the bitterness of that guilt gnaws at my eyes, dredging up tears unbidden."

traits.locale_text: 「あんたのオーラに渦巻く、病んだ錆の濃さ……それは罪悪感だよ、ゲネター。そしてその罪悪感の苦さが、あたしの目を蝕んで、望みもしない涙を引きずり出すのさ」

languages.text: “你灵光中凝聚的病态锈蚀……是愧疚，基因士。那份苦涩的愧疚灼烧着我的双眼，迫使我不由自主地流泪。”
languages.original_text: "The concentration of sickly rust in your aura... is guilt, Genetor. And the bitterness of that guilt gnaws at my eyes, dredging up tears unbidden."

traits.locale_text: “你灵光中凝聚的病态锈蚀……是愧疚，基因士。那份苦涩的愧疚灼烧着我的双眼，迫使我不由自主地流泪。”

languages.text: "Die Konzentration von Rost in Eurer Aura ... ist Schuld, Genetor. Und der bittere Geschmack dieser Schuld reizt meine Augen und lässt sie tränen."
languages.original_text: "The concentration of sickly rust in your aura... is guilt, Genetor. And the bitterness of that guilt gnaws at my eyes, dredging up tears unbidden."

traits.locale_text: "Die Konzentration von Rost in Eurer Aura ... ist Schuld, Genetor. Und der bittere Geschmack dieser Schuld reizt meine Augen und lässt sie tränen."

languages.text: « Votre aura est rongée par une rouille malsaine... C'est de la culpabilité, genetor. Cette émanation corrompue me blesse les yeux et fait affluer mes larmes. »
languages.original_text: "The concentration of sickly rust in your aura... is guilt, Genetor. And the bitterness of that guilt gnaws at my eyes, dredging up tears unbidden."

traits.locale_text: « Votre aura est rongée par une rouille malsaine... C'est de la culpabilité, genetor. Cette émanation corrompue me blesse les yeux et fait affluer mes larmes. »

languages.text: "Aurandaki o hastalıklı pas yoğunluğu... Suçluluk bu Genetör. Suçluluğun acılığı gözlerimi kemiriyor, çağrılmamış gözyaşları döküyor."
languages.original_text: "The concentration of sickly rust in your aura... is guilt, Genetor. And the bitterness of that guilt gnaws at my eyes, dredging up tears unbidden."
